---
title: "shorter"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
short_ligase_ela <- ligase_ela %>% select(-filename_fastq,-filename_fast5, -filename_pod5, -parent_read_id, -pore_type)
```

```{r}

shorter_seqsum <- function(my_data){
  my_data <- my_data %>% select(-filename_fastq,-filename_fast5, -filename_pod5, -parent_read_id, -pore_type)
  
}

```


```{r}
sseqsum_database <- lapply(seqsum_database, shorter_seqsum)
```
